---
name: Report an ambiguity
about: Flag where the specification is unclear or open to multiple reasonable interpretations
title: "[Ambiguity] "
labels: docs, clarification
---

## Where in the spec is unclear?

Section reference (e.g., "§4.2 Content Readability — `markdown-negotiation`") and a quote of the current text.

## What does it currently say?

> [Quoted text from SPEC.md]

## What different interpretations are possible?

List the distinct ways an implementer could read this. The more concrete, the better.

## What should it say?

If you have a suggested clarification, write it here. If you're flagging the ambiguity but want maintainers to decide on the resolution, leave this empty.

## Why does the current wording cause confusion?

Brief explanation. Bonus points if you can describe a concrete implementation scenario where the ambiguity caused divergent results.
